creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Chris,

Thanks for your submission. Unfortunately, Tijl is right : I don't think using internal polarssl is the way to go since it is quite old now and will suffer from the same security flaws as the version from ports.

If dolphin-emu is the only port that prevents you from updating polarssl in ports, then you can proceed. If necessary, I'll mark the dolphin-emu port as BROKEN while waiting for dolphin-emu 5.0 to be released (which should happen soon by now).

Thanks again,
Regards,
Ganael.
